fixes.origin: String query = "SELECT content FROM export_data WHERE category = '" + category + "'";
fixes.replacement:
String safe = category.matches("[a-zA-Z0-9_]+") ? category : "default";
String query = "SELECT content FROM export_data WHERE category = '" + safe + "'";

java.util.Map<String,String> allowed = java.util.Map.of("daily","daily.txt","full","full.txt");
File f = new File(exportRoot + "/" + allowed.getOrDefault(name, "daily.txt"));

static_findings.message: Possible SQL injection: SQL query variable "query" appears to be built unsafely before execution.
static_findings.evidence: String query = "SELECT content FROM export_data WHERE category = '" + category + "'"

static_findings.vulnerability: Use of a Broken or Risky Cryptographic Algorithm
static_findings.message: MessageDigest.getInstance("MD5") uses MD5, which is considered cryptographically weak.
